title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Samsung R&D India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Samsung R&D India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Samsung R&D India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Samsung R&D India:
Samsung R&D India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung R&D India!
